content_body: We thank the lord for making this possible. We thank Him for orchestrating our interaction and friendship with Gary! Gary, you are the absolute best. My sister and I have never stayed in a cabin like one that is as lovelly like this one. Your cabin is relaxing and peaceful! Thank you for everything! May you be blessed immensely. Peace and blessings to all that stay in the Mayfly.
title: Perfect Sisters Weekend!
